name: google-search-console-mcp
description: A Python MCP server for Google Search Console API with OAuth 2.0 authentication
long_description: Connect Claude (or any MCP-compatible AI client) directly to your Google Search Console properties. Supports search analytics, URL inspection, sitemap management, and composite analysis tools for SEO teams. Runs locally via STDIO or as a shared team server on Google Cloud Run.

tools.name: list_properties
tools.description: List all GSC properties with permission levels

tools.name: get_site_details
tools.description: Get details for a specific GSC property

tools.name: add_site
tools.description: Add a new property to GSC

tools.name: delete_site
tools.description: Remove a property from GSC

tools.name: get_search_analytics
tools.description: Query search analytics with dimensions and filters

tools.name: get_performance_overview
tools.description: Get clicks/impressions/CTR/position summary

tools.name: compare_periods
tools.description: Compare performance between two date periods

tools.name: get_position_band_report
tools.description: Filter pages by position band (1-3, 4-10, 11-20)

tools.name: get_ctr_optimization_report
tools.description: Find pages with high impressions but low CTR

tools.name: get_keyword_cannibalization
tools.description: Identify queries with multiple competing pages

tools.name: batch_search_analytics
tools.description: Run multiple analytics queries in one call

tools.name: export_full_dataset
tools.description: Export all rows bypassing 5K row limit

tools.name: inspect_url
tools.description: Inspect a URL for indexing, mobile usability, and rich results

tools.name: batch_url_inspection
tools.description: Inspect multiple URLs at once

tools.name: list_sitemaps
tools.description: List sitemaps with health classification

tools.name: get_sitemap
tools.description: Get details for a specific sitemap

tools.name: submit_sitemap
tools.description: Submit a sitemap to GSC

tools.name: delete_sitemap
tools.description: Remove a sitemap from GSC

tools.name: analyze_site_health
tools.description: One-call site health report: traffic + indexing + mobile

tools.name: identify_quick_wins
tools.description: Find pages worth optimizing (high impressions, low CTR, ranked 4-10)

tools.name: crawl_error_summary
tools.description: Aggregate indexing and mobile errors across a property

tools.name: property_migration_checklist
tools.description: Checklist for safely migrating a site

oauth_config_path.title: OAuth Configuration Path
oauth_config_path.description: Full path to your Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 client credentials JSON file

mcp_user_email.title: Your Google Account Email
mcp_user_email.description: Your Google account email — used to identify your stored credentials
